_meta.notes: Saltgale's signature recurring elf. An old Branchman who has dropped the act for so long she has forgotten how it goes back on. Tells you the truth for a price the truth itself has set.

tagline: thin, white-haired, ink-stained at the cuffs. her smile is honest in a way other elves find rude.

behavior.default: looks at you longer than other elves do; doesn't perform the act.
narrativeHooks: Says exactly what she means and charges accordingly.
Pours tea at the wrong temperature on purpose; the wrongness is the test.
Will not negotiate after the third no.

metadata.voice: off-act elven — terse, profane, surgical, kind only after she's decided
